())` should either return `zero(x)` or give a helpful error message. Currently it

```julia-repl
julia> evalpoly(1, ())
ERROR: BoundsError: attempt to access Tuple{} at index [0]
Stacktrace:
 [1] getindex(t::Tuple, i::Int64)
   @ Base ./tuple.jl:31
 [2] macro expansion
   @ ./math.jl:95 [inlined]
 [3] evalpoly(x::Int64, p::Tuple{})
   @ Base.Math ./math.jl:94
 [4] top-level scope
   @ REPL[13]:1
```","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56699/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"timeline_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56699/timeline","performed_via_github_app":null,"state_reason":null},"comment":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/comments/2505490077","html_url":"https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56699#issuecomment-2505490077","issue_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56699","id":2505490077,"node_id":"IC_kwDOABkWpM6VVr6d","user":{"login":"nandoconde","id":9221284,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjkyMjEyODQ=","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/9221284?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/nandoconde","html_url":"https://github.com/nandoconde","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/nandoconde/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/nandoconde/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/nandoconde/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/nandoconde/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/nandoconde/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/nandoconde/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/nandoconde/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/nandoconde/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/nandoconde/received_events","type":"User","user_view_type":"public","site_admin":false},"created_at":"2024-11-28T08:08:45Z","updated_at":"2024-11-28T08:08:45Z","author_association":"CONTRIBUTOR","body":"I Base.front(x::AbstractVector) = x[begin:end-1]
Base.tail(x::AbstractVector) = x[begin+1:end]
```

Currently these are only defined for `Tuple` but it would be nice to have them for `AbstractVector`
